title: T-070 — Seed: manufacturing_operations + alert_thresholds + iso4217 baseline
prompt: Add seed migration that populates the reference rows depended on by 03-TECHNICAL: reference_tables.manufacturing_operations.row_keys for Apex baseline (Mix, Cook, Cool, Coat, Slice, Roast, Bake, Pack — match Phase D Builder N+1 §6.1) AND reference_tables.alert_thresholds rows (atp_swab_rlu_max=10, catch_weight_variance_pct=5). Idempotent — uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. RED tests/db/seed-baseline.test.ts verifies presence. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/seed-baseline.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Idempotent seed for manufacturing_operations + alert_thresholds reference rows.
pipeline_inputs.details: Org-scoped seeds run per org tenant. Uses 02-SETTINGS reference_tables. ATP threshold default 10 RLU, catch-weight variance 5%, plus an example list of 8 manufacturing operations.
acceptance_criteria: Given seed runs against a fresh org, when applied, then 8 manufacturing_operations rows exist for that org.
Given seed runs twice, when applied second time, then no duplicate rows.
Given alert_thresholds row 'atp_swab_rlu_max' missing, when seed runs, then it is created with value=10.
risk_red_lines: Do not seed across orgs blindly — must accept org_id parameter.
